problem.title: Two Sum Ii Input Array Sorted

approaches.title: Brute Force
approaches.summary: Iterate through all pairs of numbers to find the target sum.

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Initial brute force solution with O(n^2) time complexity.

approaches.title: Two Pointers
approaches.summary: Use two pointers starting from both ends to efficiently find the target sum.

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Optimized to O(n) time using two pointers on the sorted array.
